name: Wasmtime cloud
description: Wasmtime cloud — Bytecode Alliance's WebAssembly runtime for server-side sandboxed execution with WASI support.

seo.title: Wasmtime cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Wasmtime cloud: Wasmtime cloud — Bytecode Alliance's WebAssembly runtime for server-side sandboxed execution with WASI support.

when_to_use: WASI-compliant sandbox for running untrusted code safely
Multi-language serverless execution via Bytecode Alliance runtime
Secure plugin execution in applications with Wasmtime sandbox
Component model Wasm for portable cross-language APIs
Fast and secure server-side Wasm execution in production

pros: Reference Wasm runtime from Bytecode Alliance
Backed by Fastly, Mozilla, Microsoft engineers
cons: It's a runtime, not a hosted cloud service
You still need to build your orchestration layer
review.verdict: The most serious Wasm runtime for server-side use, but don't mistake it for a managed cloud product.
review.best_for: Infrastructure teams embedding Wasm execution into their own platforms
review.not_for: App developers wanting a deploy-this-URL managed Wasm platform
